untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental analysis indicators not available in technical indicator set: (1) 5-year earnings growth rate, (2) YoY earnings growth for last 2 quarters, (3) earnings growth rate deceleration tracking. These are earnings quality metrics that cannot be derived from OHLCV price/volume data alone. Only the price range condition ($12-$18) can be expressed using available technical indicators.
translation_notes: Translated only the price range entry condition (close >= 12 AND close <= 18) and the $12 stop-loss exit condition. The core momentum and earnings quality requirements (5-year EPS growth, 2-quarter YoY earnings growth, earnings deceleration tolerance) require fundamental data not present in the allowed technical indicator set. A complete backtest would need to integrate earnings database lookups.
